changes: Rewrote SKILL.md based on successful bare/gemini-3-flash and opencode/qwen3.5-122b targeted skills
Added explicit Step 1: Always extract text first with pdfplumber before any other operation
Added CRITICAL warning: do NOT use reader.metadata — parse page text instead for titles, authors, dates
Provided concrete text parsing patterns (Author: line splitting, first-line-is-title, currency/percent stripping)
Used PdfWriter.append() for merging (PdfMerger removed in pypdf v6+)
Added rule: write multi-line .py scripts instead of one-liner python -c to avoid syntax errors
Included venv reuse guidance for setup efficiency
